mapper.select: select id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted, remark, qrcode from inv_qrcodedetail where id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update inv_qrcodedetail
create_by = #{createBy},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
remark = #{remark},
qrcode = #{qrcode},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update inv_qrcodedetail set is_deleted = '1',update_by=#{username}, update_time = now(),remark = CONCAT(remark, '|', #{username}, '删除', NOW()) where id = #{id}

update inv_qrcodedetail set is_deleted = '1',update_by=#{username}, update_time = now(),remark = CONCAT(remark, '|', #{username}, '删除', NOW()) where id in
#{id}

update.foreach:
update inv_qrcodedetail
create_by = #{item.createBy},
create_time = #{item.createTime},
update_by = #{item.updateBy},
update_time = #{item.updateTime},
is_deleted = #{item.isDeleted},
remark = #{item.remark},
qrcode = #{item.qrcode},
where id = #{item.id}
